_comment: Copy to local.settings.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. Only read by 'func start' locally — in Azure the same four Zt_ keys are set via 'az functionapp config appsettings set'.

Values.Zt_SendGridKey: <your SendGrid API key, or leave blank to SIMULATE email locally>

Host._corsNote: Wildcard is fine for local dev only. In Azure use 'az functionapp cors add' with your exact Flutter origin instead of '*'.
